subcodes.first_line: We have verily sent down the verses, for We are the Ancient Revealer. We have manifested the clear proofs, for We are the All-Knowing Manifestor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الایات و انا المنزل القدیم قد اظهرنا البینات و انا المظهر العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
